title: play kube envVar.valueFrom.resourceFieldRef
body:
add support for env vars values from container resources
see https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.19/#envvarsource-v1-core

relates to issue https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/12756
relates to bug https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/13115

Signed-off-by: Yaron Dayagi <ydayagi@redhat.com>

comments.body: You are failing lint, and need a tests.

> You are failing lint, and need a tests.

oops. although....there are other lint errors in the file prior to my changes. weird.
what do u mean by tests? you mean pass the CI tests/checks?
